items.name: Emergency-Power-Cut-Detection-with-Automatic-Nearest-Floor-Rescue
items.description: A smart elevator safety system that detects emergency power failures and automatically moves the lift to the nearest floor for safe evacuation. Enhances passenger safety using real-time monitoring and automated rescue mechanisms.

items.name: Emergency-Power-Cut-Detection-with-Automatic-Nearest-Floor-Rescue
items.description: A reliable elevator safety solution that identifies sudden power failures and triggers an automatic nearest-floor landing. Designed to prevent passengers from being trapped, ensuring quick and safe evacuation during unexpected outages.

items.name: Emergency-Power-Cut-Detection-with-Automatic-Nearest-Floor-Rescue
items.description: An automated emergency response system for elevators that detects power interruptions and safely directs the lift to the nearest floor. Focuses on improving safety, reducing risk, and providing a seamless rescue process without manual intervention.

items.name: Emergency-Power-Cut-Detection-with-Automatic-Nearest-Floor-Rescue
items.description: An intelligent system for detecting power cuts in elevators and ensuring automatic nearest-floor rescue. Uses sensors and control logic to safely bring passengers to the closest floor during emergencies.

items.name: writing-intelligence

items.name: Time-Rhythm
items.description: 《时律》是一款面向时间盲视、拖延倾向、执行功能障碍和高压多任务人群的 AI 视觉日程管理应用，它用 24 小时可视化时间圆环替代传统清单，让用户直观看见时间流逝与任务占比；同时通过 AI 自动拆解复杂任务、生成父子任务结构、插入休息节奏、检测时间冲突、在任务超时时进行温和提醒与动态顺延，帮助用户把“我知道要做，但不知道怎么开始”转化为“下一步该做什么、现在还剩多少时间、是否需要休息”的清晰行动路径。这个产品要解决的核心痛点，是用户面对大任务时容易启动困难、对时间没有真实感、经常低估任务耗时、排程过满后迅速疲惫，以及现有效率工具过于表格化、理性化、缺少情绪安抚与视觉反馈的问题。
